name: Stem-cell conditioned medium
summary: Stem-cell conditioned medium is normalized for meta-analyzed human skin-aging RCT evidence around topical secretome preparations.
mechanism_summary: Uses stem-cell secretome mixtures as topical adjuncts to nonsurgical resurfacing, with evidence bounded to local skin appearance and biomarker endpoints.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Conditioned medium meta-analysis supported skin antiaging endpoints.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
